name: Dealix — Distribution Lead Intake (draft-only)
_comment: Reference blueprint. active=false on purpose. n8n is allowed ONLY for intake, reminders, booking-prep, CRM sync, and paid-event ingestion — never for the AI to send outreach, never cold WhatsApp/LinkedIn, never scraping. Import into n8n, set your own credentials, keep it inactive until reviewed.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ company: $json.company, sector: $json.sector, source: 'n8n_intake', pain_hypothesis: $json.pain_hypothesis, offer_angle: $json.offer_angle, preferred_channel: $json.preferred_channel || 'email', risk: 'medium' }) }}

string.name: note
string.value: Prospect created. Draft + outreach stay pending founder approval in Dealix. No message is sent by n8n.
